description: The Trigger Haptics On Controller node takes in a side and will send out haptic pulses to the controller on that side.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Calls an impulse to send haptic data to one side of the controllers.
fields.Side: The side that will trigger the haptics for the controllers.
fields.RelativeIntensity: How much this will notify the user using haptics.
fields.Next: Fires after sending the haptic pulse.
